candidates.title: Europe Compression Break Day Trade
candidates.thesis: Trade directional expansion only when a compressed Europe-session range starts releasing with aligned momentum and range-position confirmation. Corpus anchor: SRC-001: 3. candidates.title: Europe Failed Break Fade Day Trade
candidates.thesis: Fade a failed Europe-open break only after the extension stalls, reversal pressure appears, and price starts snapping back from the stretched edge rather than chasing continuation. candidates.title: London Range Reclaim Day Trade
candidates.thesis: Fade failed London-session extension only after price starts reclaiming back into the recent range with a controlled reversal profile. Corpus anchor: SRC-003: Always remember Wyckoff's second law, the law of cause and effect. If the cause is large, then this will be reflected in the effect, which applies to support and resistance. candidates.title: Overlap Trend Retest Day Trade
candidates.thesis: Trade overlap-session continuation only after an established move retests without breaking trend structure, aiming for a longer directional follow-through than the retired scalping family. Corpus anchor: SRC-004: The longer a market consolidates in a narrow range, then the more dramatic the resulting price action once the market moves away from this region.
